signals.headline: CAVS TAKE 1-0 SERIES LEAD OVER RAPTORS IN PLAYOFFS | YES (Cavs lead series) | HIGH confidence** [6]
signals.raw:
CAVS TAKE 1-0 SERIES LEAD OVER RAPTORS IN PLAYOFFS | YES (Cavs lead series) | HIGH confidence** [6]

Cooper Flagg dropped 45 points (near triple-double with 9 assists, 8 rebounds) to lead Mavericks past injury-depleted Lakers 134-128, ending Dallas' 14-game home losing streak; Flagg made history as first rookie with back-to-back 40+ point games since Allen Iverson[1][2][3]. No series win confirmed
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
